product_results.title: Nike Men's Air Max LTD 3 Shoes

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be good quality and absolutely fabulous. They describe them as very comfortable and elegant with a comfortable fit. The shoes are considered very nice looking in terms of appearance. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the fit and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable shoe
authors_reviews.text: I would suggest buy a half size up or try on at Champs or Foot locker for sizing. This is my second pair love these shoes. My standard size is 8.5 wear a 9 in these.
authors_reviews.author: JD Shaw

authors_reviews.title: One Star
authors_reviews.text: Not worth what you pay for them!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer
